message:
test(core): comprehensive lock module test suite (20 tests, was 4)

Add 16 new tests covering LockError Display (AlreadyRunning, NoMeta, Io,
Metadata), LockMetadata (new() fields, serde roundtrip), chrono_lite_format,
metadata_path (with/without extension), read_existing_lock_error (valid meta,
corrupt meta, no file), lock_path/meta_path accessors, reacquire after release,
check_running no file, acquire creates parent directories.

Also fix std::time::Instant vs tokio::time::Instant type mismatch in
workflows.rs (broken by prior commit 0375a6b2).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
